resumeLength: One page unless academic publications or research output justify a CV.

formattingRules.fontRecommendation: Clean technical font; formulas/methods should be readable but not overcrowded.
formattingRules.bulletStyle: Method, dataset/problem, validation, and interpretation in each bullet when available.

writingRules.bulletFormula: Action + statistical/math method + dataset/problem + validation metric + interpretation or decision value
quantificationRules: Prefer concrete scope: sample size, stakeholder count, case volume, event size, model accuracy, project duration, budget, risk, or response time when supported by source facts.
When exact numbers are absent, use bounded evidence such as tool, method, deliverable, audience, or process scope; never invent metrics.
Use metrics differently by domain: technical performance for engineering, compliance/accuracy for audit, writing/research output for law and policy, service reliability for hospitality.

exampleBullets.strong: Modeled survey response patterns in R and validated assumptions through residual checks and sensitivity analysis.
exampleBullets.reason: Names method, tool, and validation logic.

exampleBullets.strong: Simulated parameter changes across multiple scenarios to compare model stability and summarize implications for the research team.
exampleBullets.reason: Shows quantitative method and interpretation value without inventing numbers.

scoringCriteria.description: Conventional headings, readable layout, aligned dates, consistent spacing, and parser-friendly text.
Prominent sections and bullets match the target role and market context.
Bullets show action, method, scope, and outcome without unsupported claims.
Specific, concise, role-native language with no inflated AI phrasing.
Structure and density match the selected role, country, and CV/resume style.

promptSnippets.title: Statistics and Mathematics Resume routing rule
promptSnippets.content: When the target role matches Statistics / Mathematics / Quantitative Research, use Statistics and Mathematics Resume as the primary industry route and adopt this formula: Action + statistical/math method + dataset/problem + validation metric + interpretation or decision value.

promptSnippets.title: Statistics and Mathematics Resume language guardrail
promptSnippets.content: Preserve domain-native evidence for Statistics / Mathematics / Quantitative Research; do not convert the profile into a generic tech, finance, or consulting resume unless the user target explicitly requires it.

sourceReferences.note: 56 newly added CV/resume samples from docs/sample-resume-knowledge; abstracted into rules only, without copying resume text.
